data.content: Implementation review: 3 violations found. (1) Dead code — src/lib/agent-adapter-normalizers.ts is a new file with no importers; must be deleted. (2) Unused import — StateCreator imported but unused in src/stores/terminal-store.ts. (3) Interface drift — BeadsBackend.listWorkflows() dropped its optional _repoPath parameter instead of keeping it for interface conformance. All quality gates pass; no behavior regressions. Sending back for these three fixes.
